name: Cream Sherry Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the ganache by combining 8 ounces of dark sweet chocolate and 2/3 cup of heavy cream in a bowl. Heat until smooth, then stir in 2 tablespoons of Bristol Cream Sherry.
2. Let the ganache cool to room temperature, then refrigerate.
3. Melt 16 ounces of dark sweet chocolate and mix with 1/4 cup of vegetable oil.
4. Dip truffles into the melted chocolate mixture.
5. Roll dipped truffles in chocolate shavings.
